creator: rz@fabmicro.ru
text:
Just reinstalled Linphone from packages, it reports lots of missing symbols, see below. It worked well a couple of months ago.


rz@butterfly:~ % uname -a
FreeBSD butterfly 13.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC amd64

rz@butterfly:~ % pkg info linphone
linphone-4.4.8_1,1
Name           : linphone
Version        : 4.4.8_1,1
Installed on   : Tue Aug 23 19:18:46 2022 +05
...

rz@butterfly:~ % pkg info liblinphone
liblinphone-5.1.32_1
Name           : liblinphone
Version        : 5.1.32_1
Installed on   : Tue Aug 23 19:18:45 2022 +05

belle-sip-5.1.32_1             SIP (RFC 3261) implementation written in C
rz@butterfly:~ % pkg info belle-sip-5.1.32_1
belle-sip-5.1.32_1
Name           : belle-sip
Version        : 5.1.32_1
Installed on   : Tue Aug 23 19:04:38 2022 +05


rz@butterfly:~ % linphone
[19:26:58:255][0x81366e020][Info]"Starting Linphone (bin: linphone)"
[19:26:58:257][0x81366e020][Info]"Use locale: en"
[19:26:58:308][0x81366e020][Info]Available fonts :
...
[19:20:35:711][0x81366e020][Info]"Running app..."
[19:20:35:764][0x81366e020][Info]"Activated selectors:" ("custom", "C", "unix", "freebsd", "freebsd")
[19:20:35:765][0x81366e020][Info]"Registering types..."
[19:20:35:765][0x81366e020][Info]"Registering shared types..."
[19:20:35:766][0x81366e020][Info]"Registering tool types..."
[19:20:35:766][0x81366e020][Info]"Registering shared tool types..."
[19:20:35:911][0x81366e020][Info]"Loading main view..."
[19:20:36:081][0x81366e020][Info]"Launch async core creation."
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/liblinphone.so.10: Undefined symbol "_ZN4belr13GrammarLoader3getEv"


Port net/liphone does not build at all:
